name: Putt Social
about: Putt Social is an indoor golf facility in Green Bay, Wisconsin, featuring a 5500 square foot putting track and 11 simulator bays. It offers a 9-hole putting course designed for all ages and skill levels, with a game room and a private party room available for events. The venue provides an all-day rate and various pricing options, aiming to be a destination for families, friends, and solo players looking for a fun golfing experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Variety of entertainment options including putting track and game room
Flexible pricing with all-day and replay rates
Private party room available for group events
Multiple simulator bays for different play styles

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service on site

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: The website mentions 'The Sticks' but doesn't specify if rental clubs are provided. It's recommended to bring your own clubs or contact the venue for details.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There's no mention of outside food or drink policies on the website, so it's unclear whether BYOB is allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website states rates are for 18 holes but doesn't specify the typical time required to complete them.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Putt Social offers free entry for kids 4 and under and a discounted rate for kids 5-12, along with a family-friendly atmosphere that includes a game room.
